meaning: n.执照,许可证,特许vt.许可,特许,认可,发给执照
examples: He did not hold a firearms licence.
The licence can be renewed on expiry.
Jim is halfway to attaining his pilot's licence.
One in 10 admitted they had not renewed their licence for more than 10 years.
The BBC licence fee will finance some start-up costs, but advertising is likely to fund the services.
